title: Goofite
description:
This Adds 3 New Tools (Which Are Overpowered)
This Adds A New Ore Type (Spawns Like Iron)
This Adds A New Block (goofy)
body:
This Mods Adds Goofy Ore Which Can Be Used To Make The Below

-Goofy Apple (Sets you on fire for 2 seconds but gives full saturation)

-Goofy Armor (Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, Boots)

-Goofy Pickaxe

-Goofy Axe

-Goofy Sword

-Goofy Block (Made With Goofy Ore)

-Goofy Ore (Spawns Like Iron)

-Advancements for earning the above!
